name: VeriWorkly Resume Builder
description: Free, open-source, and privacy-first resume builder. Create polished resumes quickly with flexible templates, strong privacy defaults, and optional sync/share workflows.

capabilities.name: Export Resume
capabilities.description: Generate a PDF or JSON export of a resume using its ID or a public token.

capabilities.name: Manage Resumes
capabilities.description: List, read, and sync complete resume content.

capabilities.name: Manage Profiles
capabilities.description: Read and update the master user profile used to seed new resumes.

capabilities.name: Share Resumes
capabilities.description: Create, list, and revoke public access tokens for resumes.

capabilities.name: Read Public Data
capabilities.description: Access public roadmap and Github integration metrics.
